query:
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； 
live pannel.md可以去除掉了；

transcript.content: 能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；

decision.archive_summary: Active thread remains the same: build a standalone Codex/VS Code context-size UI. Durable requirements: the display should be directly accessible from the status bar, update automatically without manual commands/refresh, show a compact summary first, and open a small detail window/popup on click. Boundary requirement: do not couple this to Project Assistant; keep it as a separate extension/integration. Latest request refines the current UI by merging overlapping surfaces into one and removing live-panel.md.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn is a refinement of the same unfinished implementation, so relation=continue. The old task is not resolved; the new ask depends on recent raw context about the standalone-extension boundary and the currently duplicated UI surfaces. Early turns about generic context visibility and command-based access are superseded by the later automatic-status-bar requirement, so they can leave the next-turn raw prompt. The live-panel surface is now explicitly deprecated, so the earlier status snapshot describing it is a good eviction candidate, with its substance captured in the archive summary.

applied.archiveSummary: Active thread remains the same: build a standalone Codex/VS Code context-size UI. Durable requirements: the display should be directly accessible from the status bar, update automatically without manual commands/refresh, show a compact summary first, and open a small detail window/popup on click. Boundary requirement: do not couple this to Project Assistant; keep it as a separate extension/integration. Latest request refines the current UI by merging overlapping surfaces into one and removing live-panel.md.
